items.briefing:
Good news for Australians — a recent report suggests cybercrime risk for individuals here is declining. However, small and medium businesses are increasingly in the crosshairs. One active threat to watch: scammers are impersonating Interpol to target small businesses with ransomware, claiming the organisation has found illegal activity on their systems. This is a scam — Interpol does not contact businesses this way.

Apple has also changed how it releases security updates, meaning fixes may now arrive more frequently and outside regular update cycles. Keep your Apple devices set to update automatically to stay protected.

featured.title: Yahoo Boys, a persistent menace and one of the longest running online crime cultures
featured.quote: Yahoo Boys evolving into AI-enabled cybercrime poses direct threat to Australian businesses and individuals.
